latest_promoted_evidence.freshness_boundary: This remains the latest promoted Azure control-plane evidence. It does not prove current guest health, pricing, SKU availability, quota, actual cost, or present-day deployment state.

ci_verification.claim_boundary: PR #28 CI proved repository execution but did not close the contract-backed rehearsal-teardown finding. PR #29 requires fresh exact-head CI. No CI run proves Azure snapshot recoverability, Trusted Launch bootability, rollback, cost, quota, or execution authority.

operations_and_recovery.blocking_finding: The validator synthesized successful rehearsal teardown without authoritative contract fields or phase evidence requiring deallocation and removal before forward progress.
required_patch: add contract-backed rehearsal deallocation and temporary-compute removal requirements
place teardown before the selected forward boundary
enumerate the only temporary recovery artifacts allowed to remain
validate contract and phase evidence rather than hard-coded result booleans
add negative tests for missing deallocation, missing removal, late boundary, and unapproved retained artifacts
obtain fresh exact-head CI and another operations-and-recovery review
operations_and_recovery.claim_boundary: The PR #28 merge did not convert the changes-required review into approval.

conditions: fresh authenticated subscription-specific meter, SKU-availability, and quota preflight before any execution
stop and obtain renewed cost approval if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 4
unconditional stop if projected temporary cost exceeds CAD 10
cleanup owner and deadline must be approved before any temporary resource is created
azure_cost.claim_boundary: Planning feasibility only; this is not an actual-cost observation, subscription-specific quotation, budget approval, or Azure execution authorization.

required_gates: validator reads and fails closed on deallocation, removal, retained-artifact, boundary, and zero-overlap fields
negative regression tests for each blocking review case
fresh exact-head CI and operations-and-recovery approval
next_bounded_operation.next_gate: Complete PR #29 CI and re-review only. Do not merge, authenticate to Azure, activate workflows, or perform mutations.
